positive: A highly stylized, minimal illustration featuring a whimsical collection of floating celestial objects: crescent moons, nebula swirls, small planets, and twinkling stars. The composition is centered and balanced, arranged like an ethereal bouquet. Use strong, deep indigo and velvety midnight blue as the primary colors, contrasted with accents of bright iridescent gold and cool silver. The style should be graphic and stylized, resembling modern celestial cartography combined with sophisticated enamel pin artwork. Clean, thick lines, high contrast silhouettes, and perfect symmetry are essential. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, grainy, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noisy, signature, disfigured, grainy
